planSummary: Phase 6 of Plan Features Overhaul (PR #104): super-admin per-organization entitlement overrides with audit logging and event-driven cache invalidation.
runSummary: Vitest unit suite (4 components) + 4 backend e2e suites prove the full loop. Live browser smoke deferred due to Node 25 ESM env issue.

cases.summary: useUpsertOverride invalidates entitlements + feature-flags queries on success
cases.text:
Run: cd apps/admin && npm run test -- --run use-upsert-override
Expected: hook spec passes — adminRequest mock called once; queryClient.invalidateQueries called for both keys.

cases.summary: OverrideCell shows Modified badge when value !== initial
cases.text:
Run: cd apps/admin && npm run test -- --run override-cell
Expected: 3/3 cases — badge appears when value differs; badge absent when value matches initial; onChange fires correctly.

Run: cd apps/admin && npm run test -- --run entitlements-table
Expected: each FeatureGroup section ('Booking & Scheduling', 'Client Engagement', 'Finance & Compliance', 'Operations', 'Platform') has a heading.

cases.summary: EntitlementsTable Save button disabled when no dirty changes
cases.text: Same suite — initial render with empty currentOverrides has Save disabled (label 'Save 0 changes').

cases.summary: SaveOverridesDialog Confirm disabled when reason < 10 chars
cases.text:
Run: cd apps/admin && npm run test -- --run save-overrides-dialog
Expected: with 'too short' typed, button remains disabled.

cases.summary: SaveOverridesDialog Confirm enabled at ≥ 10 chars; click triggers onConfirm with trimmed reason
cases.text: Same suite — typing 'Pilot customer needs coupons enabled' enables the button; click invokes onConfirm with the trimmed string.

cases.summary: Full loop: BASIC plan → coupons disabled → guard rejects → super-admin FORCE_ON → guard accepts
cases.text:
Run: cd apps/backend && npx jest --config test/jest-e2e.json test/e2e/billing/feature-full-loop.e2e-spec.ts
Expected: 7-step e2e passes including SuperAdminActionLog write verification.

cases.summary: Per-org override on org A does NOT affect org B's view
cases.text:
Run: cd apps/backend && npx jest --config test/jest-e2e.json test/e2e/billing/feature-flag-override-isolation.e2e-spec.ts
Expected: 6/6 cases pass — org A FORCE_OFF leaves org B at plan default.

Run: cd apps/backend && npx jest --config test/jest-e2e.json test/e2e/billing/quota-enforcement.e2e-spec.ts
Expected: 3/3 cases pass — guard.canActivate(EMPLOYEES) succeeds at 4/5, throws ForbiddenException at 5/5.

cases.summary: Cache invalidation event fires synchronously on plan or subscription change (no TTL wait)
cases.text:
Run: cd apps/backend && npx jest --config test/jest-e2e.json test/e2e/billing/cache-invalidation.e2e-spec.ts
Expected: 2/2 cases pass — limit change reflected immediately; plan switch reflected immediately.

cases.summary: INHERIT mode deletes the org-scoped FeatureFlag row
cases.text:
Run: cd apps/backend && npx jest upsert-feature-flag-override
Expected: handler unit spec passes — mode=INHERIT triggers deleteMany; mode=FORCE_ON/FORCE_OFF triggers create-or-update.
